scripts.validate:expo:doctor: npm run --workspace apps/mobile expo:doctor && npm run --workspace apps/testbed expo:doctor
scripts.validate:expo:install-check: npm run --workspace apps/mobile expo:install-check && npm run --workspace apps/testbed expo:install-check
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run validate:expo:doctor && npm run validate:expo:install-check
